regions.text: Now, put a stop to the motion of the seat. When you do that the seat is at rest. The man is not in motion.
But he has a feeling that he is turning round and round. This is a picture of his feelings.
He is not turning round. But he seems to himself to be turning round. And everything round him seems to be turning round. Why is this?
It is because change in our motion is the cause of our feelings of motion. Through our sense of motion we get knowledge of changes in the rate and direction of our motion.
